languages.text: Upon destruction, the obelisk deals 35-60 Shock damage (armor pen 100) to all units around it and pushes them for 2 cells. On a failed TOU Save (-30), the affected creatures are Prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: Upon destruction, the obelisk deals 35-60 Shock damage (armor pen 100) to all units around it and pushes them for 2 cells. On a failed TOU Save (-30), the affected creatures are Prone for 1 round.

languages.text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals <u>(from 35 to 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.
languages.original_text: Upon destruction, the obelisk deals 35-60 Shock damage (armor pen 100) to all units around it and pushes them for 2 cells. On a failed TOU Save (-30), the affected creatures are Prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 shock damage with 100% armour penetration to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it.

When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals <u>(from 35 to 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

languages.text: При уничтожении обелиск наносит <u>(от 35 до 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} со 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 1 клетки и отталкивает их на 2 клетки. Каждое из них совершает проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −30 и в случае провала оказывается опрокинуто на 1 раунд.
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals <u>(from 35 to 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: При уничтожении обелиск наносит 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} со 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 1 клетки.

При уничтожении обелиск наносит от 35 до 60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} со 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 1 клетки и отталкивает их на 2 клетки. Каждое из них совершает проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −30 и в случае провала оказывается опрокинуто на 1 раунд.

При уничтожении обелиск наносит от 35 до 60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}электрического урона{/g} со 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробитием брони{/g} всем существам в радиусе 1 клетки и отталкивает их на 2 клетки. Каждое из них совершает проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Выносливости{/g} на {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} со штрафом −30 и в случае провала оказывается опрокинуто на 1 раунд.

languages.text: Wird der Obelisk zerstört, fügt er allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 1 Feld <u>(35 bis 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 100 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} zu und wirft sie 2 Felder zurück. Alle betroffenen Kreaturen müssen eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Zähigkeit{/g} mit einem Abzug von −30 bestehen, um nicht 1 Runde lang hingestreckt zu werden.
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals <u>(from 35 to 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: Wird der Obelisk zerstört, fügt er allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 1 Feld <u>(35 bis 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 100 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} zu und wirft sie 2 Felder zurück. Alle betroffenen Kreaturen müssen eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Zähigkeit{/g} mit einem Abzug von −30 bestehen, um nicht 1 Runde lang hingestreckt zu werden.

Wird der Obelisk zerstört, fügt er allen Kreaturen in einem Radius von 1 Feld 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}Schockschaden{/g} mit 100 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g} zu und wirft sie 2 Felder zurück. Alle betroffenen Kreaturen müssen eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Zähigkeit{/g} mit einem Abzug von −30 bestehen, um nicht 1 Runde lang hingestreckt zu werden.

languages.text: Cuando el obelisco se destruye, inflige <u>(de 35 a 60)</u> de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} a todas las criaturas en un radio de 1 casilla a su alrededor y las empuja a 2 casillas. Todas las criaturas afectadas deben superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Resistencia{/g} con una penalización de −30 o quedar derribadas durante 1 asalto.
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals <u>(from 35 to 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: Cuando el obelisco se destruye, inflige <u>(de 35 a 60)</u> de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} a todas las criaturas en un radio de 1 casilla a su alrededor y las empuja a 2 casillas. Todas las criaturas afectadas deben superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Resistencia{/g} con una penalización de −30 o quedar derribadas durante 1 asalto.

Cuando el obelisco se destruye, inflige de 35 a 60 de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}daño de conmoción{/g} con un 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g} a todas las criaturas en un radio de 1 casilla a su alrededor y las empuja a 2 casillas. Todas las criaturas afectadas deben superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Resistencia{/g} con una penalización de −30 o quedar derribadas durante 1 asalto.

languages.text: Dikili taş, imha olduğunda etrafındaki 1 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm yaratıklara %100 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip (35 ila 60) {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir ve onları 2 hücre uzağa iter. Etkilenen tüm yaratıklar, −30 ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Dayanıklılık{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde yere devrilir. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer.
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals <u>(from 35 to 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

Etkilenen tüm yaratıklar, −30 ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Dayanıklılık{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde yere devrilir. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer.

Dikili taş, imha olduğunda etrafındaki 1 hücrelik yarıçap içinde bulunan tüm yaratıklara %100 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip 35 ila 60 puan {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}şok hasarı{/g} verir ve onları 2 hücre uzağa iter. Etkilenen tüm yaratıklar, −30 ceza puanına sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Dayanıklılık{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Aksi takdirde yere devrilir. Etkisi 1 raunt sürer.

languages.text: 方尖碑被摧毁时，对周围1格范围内的所有生物造成附带100%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的<u>35至60点</u>{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}，并将其击退2格。所有受影响的生物必须通过一项带有30减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}坚韧{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，若检定失败，则陷入倒地状态，持续1轮。
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals <u>(from 35 to 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: 方尖碑被摧毁时，对周围1格范围内的所有生物造成附带100%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的35至60点{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}电击伤害{/g}，并将其击退2格。所有受影响的生物必须通过一项带有30减值的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}坚韧{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}，若检定失败，则陷入倒地状态，持续1轮。

languages.text: À sa destruction, l'obélisque inflige <u>(de 35 à 60)</u> points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 1 case autour de lui et les repousse de 2 cases. Elles doivent réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Endurance{/g} avec une pénalité de −30. En cas d'échec, elles subissent l'effet Paralysie pendant 1 round.
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals <u>(from 35 to 60)</u> {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: À sa destruction, l'obélisque inflige <u>(de 35 à 60)</u> points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 1 case autour de lui et les repousse de 2 cases. Elles doivent réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Endurance{/g} avec une pénalité de −30. En cas d'échec, elles subissent l'effet Paralysie pendant 1 round.

À sa destruction, l'obélisque inflige de 35 à 60 points de {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}dégâts d'électrocution{/g} avec 100 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g} à toutes les créatures dans un rayon de 1 case autour de lui et les repousse de 2 cases. Elles doivent réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Endurance{/g} avec une pénalité de −30. En cas d'échec, elles subissent l'effet Paralysie pendant 1 round.

languages.text: オベリスクが破壊されると、周囲1マス以内のすべての生き物に35-60の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を与え、100%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}率で、2マス押し上げます。すべての影響を受けた生き物は-30のペナルティを付与した{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}タフネス{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}耐性試験{/g}に合格しなければ、1ラウンド間伏せてしまいます。
languages.original_text: When the obelisk is destroyed, it deals 35-60 {g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}shock damage{/g} with 100% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g} to all creatures within a 1-cell radius around it and pushes them 2 cells away. All affected creatures must pass a {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}Toughness{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a −30 penalty or fall prone for 1 round.

traits.locale_text: オベリスクが破壊されると、周囲1マス以内のすべての生き物に35-60の{g|Encyclopedia:ShockDamage}ショックダメージ{/g}を与え、100%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}率で、2マス押し上げます。すべての影響を受けた生き物は-30のペナルティを付与した{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerToughness}タフネス{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}耐性試験{/g}に合格しなければ、1ラウンド間伏せてしまいます。
